scripts.local-install: bash -c 'cd ../../.. && ./node_modules/.bin/nx run-many -t build -p @copilotkit/react-core @copilotkit/react-ui @copilotkit/runtime @copilotkitnext/shared' && bash -c 'cd ../../../.. && cd ag-ui && npx -y pnpm@10 install && npx -y pnpm@10 run build' && COPILOTKIT_LOCAL=1 pnpm install && bash -c 'SRC=../../../../ag-ui/middlewares/a2ui-middleware/dist; for f in $(find ../../.. -path "*/@ag-ui/a2ui-middleware/dist/index.js" 2>/dev/null); do DIR=$(dirname "$f"); cp $SRC/index.js $SRC/index.mjs $SRC/index.d.ts $SRC/index.d.mts "$DIR/" 2>/dev/null; done; echo "a2ui-middleware: all copies patched with local build"'
